diary_entries.entry: The aurora changed everything. I feel optimistic about our future here.
Another year. Rare Martian aurora lights the sky. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.
The aurora changed everything. I feel worried about our future here.

meta_awareness: Titan (year 36): 'Three levels of simulation deep and the colonists at the bottom still argue about rations. The pattern repeats at every scale.'
